name: @forgeax/shadertoy-fractal-pyramid
description: Shadertoy port: 'fractal pyramid' (https://www.shadertoy.com/view/tsXBzS) reproduced as a fullscreen-quad custom material shader. A WGSL raymarcher driven by iResolution + iTime material params, registered through ShaderRegistry.registerMaterialShader('shadertoy::fractal-pyramid', ...).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: shadertoy demo; bench focus stays on engine-math / pixel-parity

bench.reason: shadertoy demo; bench focus stays on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; source-level shadertoy reproduction
